message:
🌱 Backend health indicator + optimistic messages (#24)

* 🌱 Backend health indicator with API polling

- Poll /api/health every 10s in addition to WebSocket state
- Show green dot only when both API and WS are reachable
- Tooltip with detailed status on hover (wrapped in button for Primer)
- Subtle glow effect on the status dot

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🐛 Optimistic user messages + deduplication

- Show user messages immediately in chat (no waiting for server round-trip)
- Deduplicate messages from watcher/server that match existing content
- Works for both send (running session) and resume (ended session) paths

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
